name: How does Utah determine fault in work chemical cases?

mainEntity.name: How does Utah determine fault in work chemical cases?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Workers' comp is no-fault; benefits regardless of employer negligence.** OSHA violations aid but not required[1][6]. **Key factors:** Third-parties fault-based. **Practical guidance:** Focus on exposure proof. No-fault simplifies. **Comp ignores fault.**
